title: Blessed and Brave

sections.label: Intro
lines: (A minor C G F)
Oh, the blessed who walk in light,
Their hearts aglow, their steps ignite,
Each path they tread is paved with gold,
In the warmth of love untold.

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: (A minor F G C)
Blessed are the hands that toil,
They reap the harvest from the soil.
With every seed, with every stone,
They build a world to call their own.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: (D minor G A minor F)
Under the vine, under the sky,
Joy blooms in hearts that never die.
The fruit of peace is theirs to hold,
A story of grace, a life of gold.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: (F C G A minor)
Oh, you’ll see them rise,
Their light will fill the skies.
The blessed wear crowns unseen,
With love that reigns supreme.
Forever in favor they sing,
Hearts aligned with heaven’s king.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: (A minor F G C)
Your children bloom like olive trees,
A promise carried on the breeze.
The echoes of your joy will flow,
To every place your roots will grow.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: (F G A minor C)
The peace of Zion on every street,
A melody where earth and heaven meet.
Step by step, the journey runs,
Blessings brighter than the sun.

sections.label: Final Chorus
lines: (F C G A minor)
Oh, you’ll see them rise,
Their light will fill the skies.
The blessed wear crowns unseen,
With love that reigns supreme.
Forever in favor they sing,
Hearts aligned with heaven’s king.

sections.label: Outro
lines: (A minor G F C)
Walk in light, let your spirit soar,
Forever blessed, forevermore.

epigraph: Blessed is every one that feareth the LORD
